description: This file defines AWS Lambda handler functions for managing orders, including get, create, update, delete, and list operations. It interacts with data access layer, logging, metrics, and tracing utilities.

methods.name: get_order
methods.description: Handles retrieval of a specific order based on event data.

methods.name: create_order
methods.description: Handles creation of a new order based on event data.

methods.name: update_order
methods.description: Handles updating an existing order based on event data.

methods.name: delete_order
methods.description: Handles deletion of an order based on event data.

methods.name: get_orders
methods.description: Retrieves a list of all orders for a tenant.
